question: [The specific question this spike answered — copied from brief.md.]
summary_of_findings: [2–3 sentences summarising what was discovered. This is the primary field an LLM will read to understand what happened in this spike without reading the full output.md.]
adr_reference: [Path to ADR if one was produced, e.g. 'docs/decisions/001-topic.md', or 'None'.]
unblocked_work: [The story, sprint, or decision that is now unblocked by this spike's answer.]
constraints_discovered: [Constraint 1 — a new constraint the team did not know before the spike.]
[Constraint 2 — add more as needed, or leave as empty array if none.]
elias_dissent: [Any dissenting view from Elias Vance, or 'None — Elias agreed with the recommendation.']
